recommendations.title: Little Monsters
recommendations.overview: A washed-up musician teams up with a teacher and a kids show personality to protect young children from a sudden outbreak of zombies.

recommendations.title: Rape Zombie: Lust of the Dead 2
recommendations.overview: A strange virus turns 90% of the world population into Lust eating Zombies. However, in Akihabara, Japan, some males were found to be uninfected. These men team up with the Zombies to go after the flesh and blood of surviving young women to fill thei

recommendations.title: Peninsula
recommendations.overview: A soldier and his team battle hordes of post-apocalyptic zombies in the wastelands of the Korean Peninsula.

recommendations.title: La Jetée
recommendations.overview: A man confronts his past during an experiment that attempts to find a solution to the problems of a post-apocalyptic world caused by a world war.

recommendations.title: Hidden
recommendations.overview: A family takes refuge in a fallout shelter to avoid a dangerous outbreak.

recommendations.title: The Video Dead
recommendations.overview: On a quiet, tree-lined street, an old television set receives a single channel that repeats the same horror film over and over, freeing zombies from the grave to kill.

recommendations.title: Turbo Kid
recommendations.overview: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, an orphaned teen must battle a ruthless warlord to save the girl of his dreams.
recommendations.director: François Simard, Anouk Whissell, Yoann-Karl Whissell

recommendations.title: Two
recommendations.overview: Two people, a man and a woman, wake up naked and with their abdomens attached to each other.

recommendations.title: Creepozoids
recommendations.overview: Five Army deserters wander the post-apocalyptic, post-industrial LA landscape seeking shelter from an increasingly toxic environment and poisonous rain.

recommendations.title: Finch
recommendations.overview: On a post-apocalyptic Earth, a robot, built to protect the life of his dying creator's beloved dog, learns about life, love, friendship, and what it means to be human.
